AgentUpdate.description:
Partial update of a mutable agent field. Only slack_channel is updatable
(name and repo binding are identity); an omitted field is left unchanged.
AgentUpdate.title: AgentUpdate

AppConfig.description: Open app-level config the UI reads before auth (org/workspace name).
AppConfig.title: AppConfig

BehaviorPacksConfig.description:
An agent's opt-in behavior packs. Validated on write and stored as JSON on
the agent row; the worker parses the same JSON at bind time.
BehaviorPacksConfig.title: BehaviorPacksConfig

BudgetConfig.description:
Per-agent budget (L1). Field names match the ACI AGENTOS_BUDGET so the
worker passes them straight through; null means platform defaults.
BudgetConfig.title: BudgetConfig

BundleFile.description: One text file inside a stored bundle (path relative to the bundle root).
BundleFile.title: BundleFile

BundleFiles.description: The readable text surfaces of a version's stored bundle.
BundleFiles.title: BundleFiles

BundleOut.description: Result of storing a bundle for a version.
BundleOut.title: BundleOut

CostReport.description: Daily spend series + total for an agent (L1 Cost view).
CostReport.title: CostReport

EvalCell.description: One cell of the eval matrix: a case's result on a version.
EvalCell.title: EvalCell

EvalMatrix.description: The eval matrix grid: rows = cases, columns = versions (most recent first).
EvalMatrix.title: EvalMatrix

EvalMatrixRow.description: One row of the eval matrix: a case across every version column.
EvalMatrixRow.title: EvalMatrixRow

EvalReport.description: An eval run's rollup, reported so the API can post the PR check.
EvalReport.title: EvalReport

EvalReportResult.description: The committed GitHub commit-status state for a reported eval run.
EvalReportResult.title: EvalReportResult

EvalTriggerRequest.description:
Ask for an on-demand platform eval run for an agent (issue #10).

Enqueues the same EvalJobRequest the git-push fan-out uses, minus the
push-only gate. With no version_id the agent's active dev deployment is
evaluated; suite falls back to Settings.eval_default_suite when omitted.
EvalTriggerRequest.title: EvalTriggerRequest

EvalTriggerResult.description: The enqueued eval job's stream id plus the resolved job identity.
EvalTriggerResult.title: EvalTriggerResult

GreetingPackConfig.description: The deterministic greeting short-circuit content for one agent.
GreetingPackConfig.title: GreetingPackConfig

HelpPackConfig.description: The deterministic help / "what can you do" short-circuit for one agent.
HelpPackConfig.title: HelpPackConfig

KillState.description: Whether an agent is currently killed (kill switch, L1).
KillState.title: KillState

LoadPackConfig.description:
Rotating "working..." load lines for one agent. Mirrors the worker's
agentos_worker.behaviorpacks.LoadPack (packs ride on agent config, not the
frozen ACI contract, so the shape is duplicated across the layers the way
BudgetConfig mirrors the ACI Budget).
LoadPackConfig.title: LoadPackConfig

MetricSeries.description: One metric as a time series for the Metrics tab charts.
MetricSeries.title: MetricSeries

MetricsSummary.description: Scalar totals for the Metrics tab stat row over a time window.
MetricsSummary.title: MetricsSummary

NavPackConfig.description: The no-dead-ends hub button for one agent (mirrors behaviorpacks.NavPack).
NavPackConfig.title: NavPackConfig

ObservationNode.description: One node in the reconstructed observation tree (Runs view).
ObservationNode.title: ObservationNode

PodLogs.description: Runner-pod logs for the per-run runner-logs affordance.
PodLogs.title: PodLogs

RunnerPods.description: The runner sandbox pods in a namespace (populates the Logs pod dropdown).
RunnerPods.title: RunnerPods

SettingConfig.description: One declared user-editable runtime knob (mirrors behaviorpacks.Setting).
SettingConfig.title: SettingConfig

SettingsPackConfig.description:
An agent's declarative allowlist of editable runtime knobs (schema only;
the override store + edit UI are a deferred runtime).
SettingsPackConfig.title: SettingsPackConfig

TipsPackConfig.description:
Rotating capability tips for one agent (mirrors behaviorpacks.TipsPack).
Separate from LoadPackConfig: a load line is what the agent is doing now, a
tip advertises what it can do.
TipsPackConfig.title: TipsPackConfig

TraceTree.description: A trace plus its reconstructed observation tree.
TraceTree.title: TraceTree

WebhookResult.description: The outcome of processing a GitHub webhook event.
WebhookResult.title: WebhookResult

schema.title: Response List Versions Agents  Agent Id  Versions Get
Response List Traces Langfuse Traces Get
